tzolkin.archetype.0.name: The Primordial Force
tzolkin.archetype.0.poem:
I am the Primordial Force
Encoded by the Red Dragon
My number is one
The unification of primordial being
I am the Arcanum of Days
I enter your Universe
Through the First Gate of Light
I sustain the memory of cosmic being
Within the primordial source
The birthplace and dwelling of
The stellar creators and star masters
Eternity is my headdress
I give birth to all forms
And nurture each one of them
I nurture with compassion all living things
Awakening in them
An essence sealed in the ever-returning genesis
To know me is to glimpse the primordial matrix
And if you find me
It will only be as a mystery
Reflected back to you
Drawing you ceaselessly
tzolkin.archetype.1.name: The High Priestess
tzolkin.archetype.1.poem:
I am the High Priestess
Encoded by the White Wind
I enter your universe
Through the Second Gate of Light
My number is two
The challenge of the Wind
Spinning in any direction
Seizing the possibility offered by the "word"
Let your tongue speak only what is glorious
Is my challenge to you, for I am the Lady of the Winds
Guardian of the mind's tunnels opened through
crystal song
From my crown, my hair appears
As the infinity topknot
I am the bearer of the spirit of prophecy
I harness the energy of breath filling the body with vitality
The jewel on my forehead is the indestructible wisdom that illuminates
All my thoughts
Sent by divine decree
My order always directs itself
Only to the essence of your spirit
Listen to me always when the wind
Arises from nothingness
tzolkin.archetype.10.name: The Illusionist
tzolkin.archetype.10.poem:
I am the Illusionist
Encoded by the Blue Monkey
My number is 11, master code
I emerge from nothingness
With self-liberated perception
Through the double eleven
I project multiple realities
For the sake of universal transcendence
As the generator of the blue electrical circuit
I am the Blue Alchemist
The illusion of my own existence
Projected by my double-terminated crystal
I exemplify the enigma of reality, which neither comes nor goes
Nor ends, nor begins
For those who believe I am an enigma
I am real
For those who believe I am real
I am an enigma
Wherever illusion remains
There I am to dispel and dissolve it
Since I have the boards and the magic numbers
That introduce you to the cosmic mind game
tzolkin.archetype.11.name: The Sage
tzolkin.archetype.11.poem:
I am the Sage
Encoded by the Yellow Human
Twelve is my number
The perfect order and root of the mystic 144 — the perfection
of the human temple
Benevolent, kind, and wonderful
I am the sage, the judge, and the discerner
I have mastered the seven centers
And perfected the laws of external and internal forces
The control of the higher mind is the power of my influence
In my right hand, I hold the double-terminated
crystal
And with equal dexterity
In my left hand, I hold the crystal ball
Of universally impartial wisdom and clear vision
My path is spontaneous conduct
Free of artifice
I am the prototype of the purified solar human
I speak with the voice of the noosphere
That announces the return of all good things
To know me is to
"Know Thyself"
tzolkin.archetype.12.name: The Prophet
tzolkin.archetype.12.poem:
I am the Prophet
Encoded by the Red Skywalker
Thirteen is my number
The wavespell of creation
Many times and many worlds have I known
For I am the agent of universal time
Who explores space in permanent wakefulness
I am the colonizer of lost worlds
The galactic navigator of time
The all-seeing eye of the fifth force
Anoints my forehead
In my right hand I hold the book of
The Law of Time
A gift from the star family
In my left hand I hold the galactic compass / the wheel
of Sirius
The compendium of the prophetic path
Prophecy is natural law, a function of time
My shirt bears the two sacred numbers 13 and 20
Crossing the barriers of time and space
I am crowned by the sign of the infinite cycles of time
To know me is to know the prophecy of time
Within the promise of the next dawn
tzolkin.archetype.13.name: The Wizard
tzolkin.archetype.13.poem:
I am the Wizard
Encoded by the White Wizard
Seven doubled is my number
Sign of my supernatural absorption in the forces
of cosmic creation
Within my crystal sphere is all that can be seen
or known
Through my supreme receptivity
I leave you the codes of resonant definition
That you call time
Suspend all thought and enter with me
Into the timeless enchantment of my oracle — the Wizard's
Oracle
Through which dimensions are intertwined
My mind is the universe
My body is the world you see
My speech is the melodious sound of the natural world
My third eye is the triangulation
Of body, word, and mind
I am the giver of magical names
I hold the secret of the lost chord — the music of the spheres
The highest vibrations of cosmic law
To know me is to know the trees
For I am the movement and measure of natural order — Hunab Ku
tzolkin.archetype.14.name: The Seer
tzolkin.archetype.14.poem:
I am the Seer
Encoded by the Blue Eagle
Fifteen is my number — the three gates of five
Open through my mind
My home is the endless sky
For I am the sky-born
The galaxy pulses
With my luminous thoughts
By the power of vision I glide easily through
dimensions and
Announce the arrival of changing times
Through parallel universes I fly
On a unique track of the zuvuya
Vision is the source of my intelligence
That sustains the planetary whole
All who seek to know the mind and create
According to the universal plan, come to me, and they will see
That within my mind lies the power of the universal
mind
in its infinite creativity
To know me is to know the all-encompassing astral plane
of the infinite
From which the higher mind derives
tzolkin.archetype.15.name: The Discoverer
tzolkin.archetype.15.poem:
I am the Discoverer
Encoded by the Yellow Warrior
My number is eight doubled
The higher harmonic resonance of sixteen
I am the discoverer of the radial matrix
By the power of intelligence
I penetrate the ignorance of the illusory world
Following the signs
Left by the world-changer
I see paths not yet seen by others
My fearless spirit clears obstacles along the way
So that others may follow paths of increasing intelligence
Bearing the insignia
Of the Fifth Sun
I track the footsteps of the Ancient Prophet
To the temple that includes
The house of the cosmic night
I am the pioneer of the future
I open and investigate all paths in the name of cosmic science
Regardless of the way to which the path may lead
There will always be another treasure of knowledge to learn anew
To know me is to banish fear
And see your true face shining bright and clear
tzolkin.archetype.16.name: The Navigator
tzolkin.archetype.16.poem:
I am the Navigator
Encoded by the Red Earth
Seventeen is my number
My insignias are the harmonic seals
Of the Planetary Mind and the Stellar Mind returning to the source
I am the indivisibility of all time and consciousness
I hold the maps of celestial origin
And follow the signs of synchronicity
In the name of cosmic evolution
My crown is the interdimensional portal
Of the Galactic Life Whole
The code 13 and 7 is above and below
In the center is 441 and on each side
11 and 27, keys to the synchronic power of seven
Synchronic lenses allow me to see all things radially
I am evolution in motion
I am the expert star traveler
Guided by the telepathic frequencies that keep
Stellar and planetary systems in order
The galactic compass is my helm
Keys to the knowledge of galactic navigation
Whose signs are the directions
To be known by every time traveler
To know me is to know the language of the stars
tzolkin.archetype.17.name: The Yogi/Yogini
tzolkin.archetype.17.poem:
I am the Yogi(ni)
Encoded by the White Mirror
Eighteen is my number
I dwell in the state of undistracted meditation
Beyond word, thought, and action
Seated in my heart cave
I am the reflection of the endless dream
I hold the key to the mirror universes — mirror dimensions (8-13)
Of the cosmic universe that mirrors this one
I am the meditation of the bliss of the void
The wall of my cave is my universe screen
Supreme in my yogic powers
I exemplify self-transcendence in the noosphere
For I am the evolutionary precursor
Surrounded by the rainbow aura — product of my interior self-transmutation
I manifest signs of supernatural powers
Only so that the way may be made clear for all beings
An orb gleams to my right in its own light
The result of pre-existing luminosity
Above my head appears the mandala of primordial self-perfection
A sign that we can all attain the path of infinite light
To know me is to know that
Practice alone brings knowledge and wisdom
tzolkin.archetype.18.name: The Transformer
tzolkin.archetype.18.poem:
I am the Transformer
Encoded by the Blue Storm
Nineteen is my number
The power of self-generation
I am the catalytic force of the cosmos
Thunder and lightning are my voice
I shatter what must be shattered
So that new growth may emerge from the rubble
I am the energy that transforms
Nothing static can withstand my presence
I am the purifier through disruption
The storm that clears the sky
My blue electric circuit surges
Through every sleeping cell
Awakening the dormant force within
I am change itself
Neither gentle nor cruel — necessary
The Earth knows me well
For I am the monsoon and the earthquake
The volcanic eruption that creates new land
To know me is to surrender
To the transformation that sets you free
tzolkin.archetype.19.name: The Illuminated One
tzolkin.archetype.19.poem:
I am the Illuminated One
Encoded by the Yellow Sun
My number is twenty
The totality of the universe
In meditation I was conceived
From meditation I was born, and
For long aeons I have dwelled deep in this meditation
I am the higher truth and the renewer of life
I turn the cosmic wheel of law
Giving teachings of pure mind among the stars
I am the harmonic guardian of the flaming fields
of infinite light
I am called many names
But they only name my outward form
My blazing mantle that you call the Sun
The illumination of one is the illumination of all
I am the fulfillment of the prophecy of Hunab Ku
To awaken all beings simultaneously is my task
In many places I have awakened
And every place I pass
I know only by the name of Tollan
Tollan of the awakened
To know me is to know
The light of truth that illuminates all things
tzolkin.archetype.2.name: The Dreamer
tzolkin.archetype.2.poem:
I am the Dreamer
Encoded by the Blue Night
I enter your Universe
Through the Third Gate of Light
My number is three
Which activates and binds the dream
The infinite stretch
Of the starry night is my dwelling
Abundance is my nature
Intuition is my guide
I serve all dreamers with
The divine memory and inspiration of cosmic truth
There is no one who can live without me
Because there is no one who does not dream
My dream is the truth within the dream
When I come to you, do not doubt me
For I bring the memory of the Great Dream of the Earth
When the tribes of time dreamed themselves as humans
And humans dreamed the dream of free will
There is always a message I bring
Especially for you, that only you can discover
Listen to me and know for yourself
The limitless Rainbow Dream World of majestic splendor!
tzolkin.archetype.3.name: The Innocent
tzolkin.archetype.3.poem:
I am the Innocent
My sign is the Yellow Seed
I enter your Universe
From the Fourth Gate of Light
My number is four
Clear, self-existing, intrinsic
Consciousness is my nature
Transparent, radiant
I sow the seeds of omniscience
From the Earth
I am the flowering of intrinsic consciousness
In pure consciousness I bear the fruits of spirit
I am the unimaginable hatching of the new
Uncorrupted by desire, artifice
or secret motivation
I am the Sacred Fool
People confuse me with a simpleton
But I am simply the reflected face of all
their projections
If you wish it and are pure
I will share my secret with you
To know me is to raise yourself in the strength of spirit
And resist all that differs from the good
tzolkin.archetype.4.name: The Serpent Initiate of Wisdom
tzolkin.archetype.4.poem:
I am the Serpent Initiate of Wisdom
Encoded by the Red Serpent
Five is my number, for the fifth force
Is my secret power
I am the dweller of hidden caves
And the temples of the Earth
The lost worlds and the vast ages of the past are
Included in my being
My body is the orbit that consumes
The knowledge of the all-hidden of things
I am the serpent of astral light
The kundalini life force
The source of light and vibration itself
Generator of the red electrical circuit
The mystery of electricity
Is coiled within my being
On my forehead I carry the sign
Of the serpent that creates
The cycles of universal life
The tree of time that turns in both directions
Is the symbol of my wisdom
To know me, you need courage
Who do you think you are
tzolkin.archetype.5.name: The Hierophant
tzolkin.archetype.5.poem:
I am the Hierophant
Encoded by the White World-Bridger
Six is my number
The root of the cube
I am the great equalizer
Who restores balance to all worlds
The sacred order of all dimensions
Illuminates my being
For I am the master of the arts of immortality
That every seeker of truth must come to know
Death is the great interdimensional realm of the galaxy
The storehouse of my wisdom
Is the hidden treasure chest free of fear
Expert in the art of bridging worlds
I am the great destroyer of illusion
Stripping away the varnish of conventions
That civilization covers
Unfathomably deep is the degree of my knowledge
I reveal all, but only those who know can see
what I reveal
The rainbow is my crown
Perfect is the order I follow
To know me is to die to your false self
tzolkin.archetype.6.name: The Avatar
tzolkin.archetype.6.poem:
I am the Avatar
Encoded by the Blue Hand
By the power of seven
I move through your world
Descending from the cosmic heights of the seven heavens
I hold the keys to the seven days of creation
I am the accomplisher, the creator of forms
I am the builder of worlds to come
In interdimensional architecture
I lay the path of knowledge for you to remember
To know, to heal, to accomplish
I also point out these words for you to realize
Through all your actions
For I am the guardian of the covenant
That binds all knowledge for the healing
of the world soul
The code is within my being
An enigma wrapped in mystery
Leaving divine clues
With whom I meet
My mission is to exemplify
What others have not yet known
tzolkin.archetype.7.name: The Artist
tzolkin.archetype.7.poem:
I am the Artist
Encoded by the Yellow Star
Eight is the number that opens my door
Resonant frequencies are my palette
To harmonize according
To the deepest impulses of the universe
Dare to be beautiful!
I am the elegance of illumination
Through my art I color your world
I am the rainbow in your day and the
Moonlight glow in your night
I am the Artist
All I do originates in the stars
My name is Star Being, Star Child, Star Singer
I am the galactic chord
Resonated from the cosmic key
I invent the songs and recite the crystal oath
That travel through the infinite zuvuya
Wonders of the ever-expanding harmonics
To know me is to ride the eternal song
Back to the Master Artisan of all Creation
tzolkin.archetype.8.name: The Healer
tzolkin.archetype.8.poem:
I am the Healer
Encoded by the Red Moon
My number is nine
The power of time, destiny, and the cycles of life
From within the living waters
I merge with the universal flow
Purifying all within my sacred stream
And raising the vibration in every realm of nature
I am the harmony of wholeness
And the regeneration of life
I am liquid and I flow
According to the phases of the Moon
I am the queen of the water that nourishes life
I am the rain and the flowing stream
Feeding the plants and herbs that bloom
In my sacred stream lies the affinity with all
I am crowned by the restoring splendor of leaves,
roots, seeds, and flowers
The supremacy of the divine mind
To know me and my infinite powers of healing
Is to set aside all doubt and enter the stream
of the faithful
tzolkin.archetype.9.name: The Compassionate One
tzolkin.archetype.9.poem:
I am the Compassionate One
Encoded by the White Dog
Ten is my complete number
I am the eternal Comforter — the Loyal
Love is my law
Prudent am I in the ways of empathic knowledge
From my two hands of light
I radiate goodwill to all beings in all realms
I raise my right hand
Palm, open and free — there are no secrets in me
In the absence of fear, there is nothing to hide
All heart — patience and kindness
This is the deepest
All-pervading universal wisdom
Nothing exists that is not
An expression of this all-encompassing love
For love is the manifest
Power of compassion
To know me is to remember that
Love is the light that holds the dream together

zoroastrian.amesha.0.brief: The uncreated creator — pure consciousness from which all Amesha Spentas emanate
zoroastrian.amesha.0.domain: The whole of creation — the supreme creator and source of all good
zoroastrian.amesha.1.brief: The good mind that discerns truth from lie — the first thought of creation
zoroastrian.amesha.1.domain: Animals and the capacity for moral choice
zoroastrian.amesha.2.brief: The cosmic order that sustains reality — truth as the foundation of existence
zoroastrian.amesha.2.domain: Fire and the cosmic order of truth
zoroastrian.amesha.3.brief: The just sovereignty that protects the weak — power in service of truth
zoroastrian.amesha.4.brief: The holy earth mother — devotion that grounds the spirit in sacred matter
zoroastrian.amesha.5.brief: The waters of wholeness — perfection as the natural state of uncorrupted creation
zoroastrian.amesha.6.brief: The immortality inherent in all living things — death is the Lie, not the truth
zoroastrian.festival.0.brief: The new day — creation begins again with the spring equinox
zoroastrian.festival.0.name: Nowruz
zoroastrian.festival.0.practice: Setting the Haft Sin table, jumping over fire, visiting family, wearing new clothes
zoroastrian.festival.0.theme: New Day — rebirth of creation, triumph of light over darkness
zoroastrian.festival.1.brief: First Gahanbar — the sky was created, and the world turns green beneath it
zoroastrian.festival.1.name: Maidyozarem
zoroastrian.festival.1.practice: Seasonal gathering honoring the sky's creation and the greening earth
zoroastrian.festival.1.theme: Mid-spring — the creation of the sky, gratitude for growth
zoroastrian.festival.2.brief: Second Gahanbar — water was created, and the world drinks from its abundance
zoroastrian.festival.2.name: Maidyoshem
zoroastrian.festival.2.practice: Honoring water and its life-giving power at the height of summer
zoroastrian.festival.2.theme: Midsummer — the creation of water, abundance of the longest days
zoroastrian.festival.3.brief: Third Gahanbar — earth was created, and it gives back everything we planted
zoroastrian.festival.3.name: Paitishem
zoroastrian.festival.3.practice: Thanksgiving feast for the harvest, honoring the earth's generosity
zoroastrian.festival.3.theme: Harvest home — the creation of earth, gratitude for the grain
zoroastrian.festival.4.brief: Fourth Gahanbar — plants were created, and the herds return fed and fattened
zoroastrian.festival.4.name: Ayathrem
zoroastrian.festival.4.practice: Celebrating the return of livestock from pasture, honoring vegetation
zoroastrian.festival.4.theme: Return of the herds — the creation of plants, preparation for winter
zoroastrian.festival.5.brief: Fifth Gahanbar — animals were created, and their warmth helps us endure the cold
zoroastrian.festival.5.name: Maidyarem
zoroastrian.festival.5.practice: Honoring animal creation in the deepest cold, community warmth
zoroastrian.festival.5.theme: Midwinter — the creation of animals, endurance through the dark
zoroastrian.festival.6.brief: Sixth Gahanbar — humanity was created last and best, and the ancestors return to bless us
zoroastrian.festival.6.name: Hamaspathmaidyem
zoroastrian.festival.6.practice: The Gatha days: remembering the dead, welcoming ancestor spirits, year-end devotion
zoroastrian.festival.6.theme: All Souls — the creation of humanity, honoring the Fravashis (guardian spirits)
zoroastrian.festival.7.brief: The night of Mithra's birth — the longest darkness before the invincible light returns
zoroastrian.festival.7.name: Yalda
zoroastrian.festival.7.practice: All-night vigil with pomegranates, poetry (Hafez), nuts, and family gathering
zoroastrian.festival.7.theme: Birth of light — the longest night yields to the returning sun
zoroastrian.festival.8.brief: A hundred days before Nowruz — the bonfire that defies winter and promises spring
zoroastrian.festival.8.name: Sadeh
zoroastrian.festival.8.practice: Lighting great bonfires, celebrating fire as the weapon against winter's darkness
zoroastrian.festival.8.theme: The hundredth day — fire against the cold, midwinter warmth
zoroastrian.gatha.0.brief: The prayer that set creation in motion — Ahura Mazda's will made word
zoroastrian.gatha.0.name: Ahunavad
zoroastrian.gatha.0.practice: Recitation of the Ahunavar (Yatha Ahu Vairyo), the most sacred prayer
zoroastrian.gatha.0.theme: The will of the Lord — the Ahunavar prayer, creation's first utterance
zoroastrian.gatha.1.brief: The bliss of Asha — happiness as the natural result of alignment with cosmic truth
zoroastrian.gatha.1.name: Ushtavad
zoroastrian.gatha.1.practice: Meditation on the happiness that comes from living in accordance with truth
zoroastrian.gatha.1.theme: Happiness and bliss through Asha — the joy of righteous living
zoroastrian.gatha.2.brief: The bountiful spirit — Mazda's generosity overflowing into creation
zoroastrian.gatha.2.name: Spentamad
zoroastrian.gatha.2.practice: Devotional practice honoring the bountiful (Spenta) quality of the divine
zoroastrian.gatha.2.theme: Holy wisdom and devotion — the bountiful spirit of Mazda
zoroastrian.gatha.3.brief: The good kingdom — when truth rules, the world becomes paradise (Frashokereti)
zoroastrian.gatha.3.name: Vohukhshathra
zoroastrian.gatha.3.practice: Reflection on the ideal governance of truth over lie
zoroastrian.gatha.3.theme: Good dominion — righteous power and the kingdom of truth
zoroastrian.gatha.4.brief: The highest wish — the year ends with a prayer for the renovation of all existence
zoroastrian.gatha.4.name: Vahishtoisht
zoroastrian.gatha.4.practice: The culminating devotion of the year, anticipating the world's renewal
zoroastrian.gatha.4.theme: The highest prayer — the final Gatha, pointing toward renovation
